overall.description: A nighttime scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a foggy hillside overlooking a neon-lit futuristic city. The camera drifts along the terrain, passes a group of figures, moves through a dark mountain valley, and encounters a flying vehicle hovering above the city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside overlook of cyberpunk metropolis

events.description: group of figures becomes visible standing on the hillside ahead

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting along the hillside overlooking the illuminated city skyline

futuristic skyscrapers with neon lights and advertisements glowing through the fog
tall building with prominent 'softsys' neon signage
group of people standing on the hilltop silhouetted against the city glow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night with a view of a cyberpunk city skyline from a grassy hillside. The camera drifts slowly to the right, revealing the 'softsys' building and a group of figures standing in the distance observing the city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark mountain valley between rocky slopes

events.description: camera moves behind the hill, city skyline disappears from view into darkness
environment becomes significantly darker as camera moves deeper into the mountain valley

agents.ego_description: moving through the dark mountain terrain away from the city lights

entered.detail: narrow valley between dark mountain slopes with minimal light
dark rocky mountainside with rough texture

segments.scene_description: The camera moves behind the hill, transitioning from the city overlook into a dark, enclosed mountain valley. The city lights disappear completely, replaced by dark rocky terrain and deep shadows as the camera navigates through the narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with aerial vehicle traffic

events.description: flying vehicle enters the frame from the right, hovering above the valley
camera adjusts to track the vehicle as it moves slowly across the sky

agents.ego_description: tracking a flying vehicle as it hovers and traverses across the night sky

notable_agents.action: futuristic flying car hovering and moving slowly across the sky with glowing thrusters

entered.detail: futuristic car with illuminated thrusters hovering and rotating in mid-air
city lights visible again in the background behind the flying vehicle

segments.scene_description: The camera pans up to reveal a flying vehicle hovering in the sky, with the cyberpunk city skyline visible in the background. The vehicle slowly traverses from right to left across the frame, its thrusters glowing against the foggy night sky as the camera tracks its movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that drifts from a luminous city overlook into a dark mountain void before ascending back toward the neon skyline. It begins on a foggy, grassy hillside overlooking a cyberpunk city, gliding to the right to reveal the softsys building and a group of distant figures watching the lights. As the camera moves behind the hill, the city view vanishes, transitioning into a dark, enclosed mountain valley defined by rocky terrain and deep shadows. The scene then shifts as the camera pans upward, emerging from the narrow passage to reveal a flying vehicle hovering against the foggy night sky. Finally, the camera tracks the vehicle as it traverses from right to left, its glowing thrusters contrasting with the distant, shimmering city skyline.
